Tests WebMCP cancelInvocation command.
Enabling WebMCP Domain
--- Invoking test_tool ---
invokeTool response: {
    invocationId : <string 0>
}
--- Canceling test_tool with invalid ID ---
Invalid invocation id
--- Canceling test_tool ---
cancelInvocation response: {
}
--- Canceling test_tool again ---
No pending execution for invocation id
toolResponded invocationId matches
toolResponded event: {
    errorText :
    invocationId : <string 0>
    status : Canceled
}
